---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest an idea or improvement
title: '[Feature] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Summary
A short, clear description of the feature you are proposing.

## Problem / Motivation
What problem does this solve? What is missing today?

## Proposed Solution
Describe the solution you would like.

## Alternatives Considered
What other approaches did you consider and why did you rule them out?

## Additional Context
Any mockups, diagrams, or links to relevant literature (e.g. CRDT papers) are welcome.
